PROJECT.NAME: iqAioThal3-mito
PROJECT.TITLE: Aiolopus thalassinus, mitochondrial assembly, iqAioThal3-mito.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the mitochondrial assembly of Aiolopus thalassinus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).
